Actions.Text: AMEND AND RECOMMIT TO WAYS AND MEANS

Title: Authorizing the county of Herkimer to impose hotel and motel taxes; and provides for the repeal of such provision upon the expiration thereof
Summary: Authorizes the county of Herkimer to impose hotel and motel taxes; provides for the repeal of such provision upon the expiration thereof.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the tax law, in relation to authorizing the county of Herkimer to establish hotel and motel taxes; and providing for the repeal of such provisions upon expiration thereof
